channel.title: Analyst Recognition on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Analyst Recognition on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: ​​Forrester names Microsoft a Leader in the 2026 Extended Detection and Response Platforms Wave™ report
item.description:
Microsoft says Forrester named it a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Extended Detection and Response Platforms, Q2 2026. The post is an announcement of the analyst recognition and does not include product changes or technical updates.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
